title: Brevo vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Sendinblue email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which platform suits your needs best.
h1: Brevo vs Sendinblue: Complete Feature & Price Comparison
intro: Brevo and Sendinblue are essentially the same platform—Sendinblue rebranded to Brevo in 2022. Both offer comprehensive CRM and multi-channel marketing capabilities with generous free tiers supporting up to 100,000 contacts. If you're evaluating either tool, you're really looking at the same solution under different names.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Live Chat, CRM, Transactional API
comparison_table.tool_b: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Chat, CRM, Transactional API

choose_a_if: You want the current, actively maintained platform under its modern brand name
You prefer a unified interface with consistent branding and updates
You're starting fresh and want the latest version of this CRM solution
choose_b_if: You're already familiar with Sendinblue and don't want to rebrand your workflows
You have existing integrations or documentation tied to the Sendinblue name
You prefer the legacy platform interface (though this is not recommended)

faq.a: Brevo is the newer branding of the same platform that was formerly called Sendinblue. They offer identical features and pricing. Brevo should be your choice if you're new to the platform, as it represents the actively maintained version with the latest updates and support.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Both platforms have identical pricing: free tier for up to 100,000 contacts and paid plans starting at $25/month. There is no cost difference between them, as they're the same service under different names.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Brevo?
faq.a: There's no need to switch—Sendinblue has already transitioned to Brevo. If you're using Sendinblue, you're already on the Brevo platform. Your account, data, and features remain the same; only the branding and interface have been updated to Brevo.
